security_deposit.allowed_deductions_rule: - Permissible deductions: Unpaid rent, damage beyond normal wear and tear, amounts owed under the lease.
security_deposit.deposit_storage_segregation_rule: - Separate account: Not required by state law (but see local ordinances).
security_deposit.special_rules_local_overrides_note: Local ordinances and special housing programs can add stricter rules.

eviction.nonpayment_notice_type: - Nonpayment of rent notice: 5 days written notice (with opportunity to cure for first violation in a rental period).
eviction.lease_violation_notice_type: - Lease violation notice: 14 days written notice with 14-day right to cure.
eviction.holdover_notice_type: - Month-to-month termination: 28 days written notice required.
eviction.timeline_estimate_rule: - Timeline: Uncontested eviction takes approximately 3-6 weeks from filing to judgment.
eviction.court_process_summary_rule: - Court process: Landlord files in circuit court; tenant is served with summons and complaint; tenant has right to appear and defend.
eviction.filing_court_rule: - Court process: Landlord files in circuit court; tenant is served with summons and complaint; tenant has right to appear and defend.
eviction.service_of_process_rule: - Court process: Landlord files in circuit court; tenant is served with summons and complaint; tenant has right to appear and defend.

landlord_entry.allowed_entry_reasons_rule: - Entry for repairs: Landlord may enter to make repairs, inspections, or to show the premises. - Entry for repairs: Landlord may enter to make repairs, inspections, or to show the premises.
landlord_entry.entry_time_window_rule: - Reasonable times: Entry should be during normal business hours or reasonable hours.
landlord_entry.penalty_for_illegal_entry_rule: Varies — confirm remedies (injunction, damages, attorney fees) under state law.

rent_increase.cap_rule: No statewide rent control; local rules may apply.
rent_increase.fixed_term_increase_allowed_rule: - Fixed-term leases: Rent cannot be increased during the lease term unless the lease specifically allows it.
rent_increase.month_to_month_increase_allowed_rule: - Rent increases: No statutory limit on amount or frequency for month-to-month tenancies.
rent_increase.delivery_method_rule: - Notice required: For month-to-month tenancies, at least 28 days advance written notice of a rent increase.
rent_increase.retaliation_protection_note: Retaliation protections may limit rent increases after protected tenant complaints; confirm local/state rules.

habitability.landlord_repair_duty_rule: - Landlord's duty: To keep premises in a fit and habitable condition, comply with applicable building and housing codes, make repairs, keep common areas clean and safe, maintain essential services.
habitability.tenant_notice_required_rule: Varies — confirm required notice/cure steps before remedies.
habitability.tenant_termination_for_unrepaired_condit: Varies — some states allow termination after notice and failure to repair.
habitability.code_enforcement_contact_rule: Varies — contact local housing/code enforcement (city/county) for inspections and official repair orders.
